 {"id":"bd-2xn","title":"Config: Implement 'asb config show' subcommand","description":"# Implement config show Subcommand

## Task

Add `asb config show` command that displays current effective configuration.

## Implementation

```bash
show_config() {
    local config_file
    config_file=$(get_config_file)

    printf '\n'
    printf '%b\n' "${BOLD}asb Configuration${RESET}"
    printf '%s\n' "─────────────────────────────"
    printf '\n'

    # Show config file status
    if [[ -f "$config_file" ]]; then
        printf "Config file: %s\n" "$config_file"
    else
        printf "Config file: %s (not created)\n" "$config_file"
        log_info "Run 'asb config init' to create"
    fi
    printf '\n'

    # Show effective values
    printf '%b\n' "${BOLD}Effective Settings${RESET}"
    printf '%s\n' "─────────────────────────────"
    printf "%-20s %s\n" "ASB_BACKUP_ROOT:" "$(get_backup_root)"
    printf "%-20s %s\n" "ASB_AUTO_COMMIT:" "${ASB_AUTO_COMMIT:-true}"
    printf "%-20s %s\n" "ASB_VERBOSE:" "${ASB_VERBOSE:-false}"
    printf '\n'

    # Show source of each value (helpful for debugging)
    printf '%b\n' "${DIM}Source: config file > environment > default${RESET}"
}
```

## Default Command

`asb config` with no arguments should run `show`:

```bash
config|cfg)
    local config_cmd="${1:-show}"  # defaults to show
```

## Output Example

```
asb Configuration
─────────────────────────────

Config file: /home/user/.config/asb/config

Effective Settings
─────────────────────────────
ASB_BACKUP_ROOT:     /home/user/.agent_settings_backups
ASB_AUTO_COMMIT:     true
ASB_VERBOSE:         false

Source: config file > environment > default
```

## Why This Matters

Users often ask "what is asb configured to do?" This gives them a single command
to see all effective settings, plus tells them where the config file is so they
can edit it.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-19T21:22:22.430164105Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-20T04:29:14.047936521Z","closed_at":"2026-01-20T04:29:14.047854717Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-2xn","depends_on_id":"bd-1j1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-19T21:28:33.370334287Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"bd-2xn","depends_on_id":"bd-1lm","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-19T21:22:22.446928621Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
